description_long: This is a modern rocking chair featuring a sleek, minimalist design with a gently curved wooden frame and a light-colored upholstered seat and backrest. The frame is constructed from a rich, medium-toned wood, forming continuous, flowing runners that allow for smooth rocking motion. The seat and backrest are made from a single, slightly contoured upholstered panel, attached to the frame with visible fasteners and providing ergonomic support. The chair includes integrated wooden armrests that curve gracefully from the base to the top of the seat, enhancing comfort and style. The runners have protective segments, possibly for added grip or to prevent floor damage. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, blending natural wood with soft fabric for a comfortable yet visually striking piece suitable for urban parks, patios, or modern public spaces.
description: A contemporary rocking chair with a curved wooden frame, integrated armrests, and a light upholstered seat and backrest. The design is sleek and ergonomic, combining natural wood and soft fabric.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, light-colored upholstered seat and backrest, framed by curved wooden armrests and runners.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlights the continuous curved wooden runners and the ergonomic tilt of the seat and backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the upholstered panel and the full width of the wooden frame and runners.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view emphasizes the smooth curve of the runners and the integration of the armrests with the frame.
